name: HDFC Swiggy Credit Card

fees.waiverCondition: Spend ₹2,00,000 or more in the previous year

categoryRates.description: 10% cashback on Swiggy orders (food delivery, Instamart, Dineout)
5% cashback on other online dining platforms (Zomato, etc.)
1% cashback on all other retail purchases

welcomeBenefits.description: Swiggy vouchers worth ₹500 on card activation
welcomeBenefits.condition: On payment of joining fee and first transaction

additionalBenefits: 10% cashback on all Swiggy services including Instamart
5% on other online dining and food delivery apps
Easy EMI conversion on purchases above ₹2,500
pros: 5% on other online dining platforms is generous
Direct cashback model with no complex point calculations
Good 1% default cashback on all other spends
cons: 10% Swiggy cashback capped at ₹1,500/month limits heavy users
₹2L fee waiver threshold is relatively high for a ₹500 fee card
3.5% forex markup is not ideal for international use
idealFor: Frequent Swiggy users who order food delivery and groceries via Instamart
Food enthusiasts who spend regularly on online dining platforms
Young professionals looking for a dining-focused cashback card

faqs.question: Is the 10% Swiggy cashback really uncapped?
faqs.answer: No, the 10% cashback on Swiggy is capped at ₹1,500 per calendar month. Once you exhaust this cap, further Swiggy orders earn at the standard 1% rate.

faqs.question: Does the card work for Swiggy Instamart orders?
faqs.answer: Yes, the 10% cashback applies to all Swiggy services including food delivery, Instamart grocery orders, and Dineout restaurant bookings.

faqs.question: How is the cashback credited?
faqs.answer: Cashback is credited directly to your credit card statement or Swiggy Money wallet, depending on the transaction type. Statement credits typically appear within 2-3 billing cycles.

faqs.question: Can I get the annual fee waived?
faqs.answer: Yes, the ₹500 annual fee is waived if you spend ₹2,00,000 or more in the previous anniversary year.
